parameters.jsCode: const ev=$('Stripe Trigger').first().json;const s=(ev.data&&ev.data.object)?ev.data.object:ev;const cust=s.customer_details||{};const email=cust.email||s.customer_email||'';if(!email)return [];const li=($json&&$json.data)?$json.data:[];const items=li.map(i=>(i.quantity+'× '+(i.description||''))).join(', ')||'your items';const name=cust.name||'';const rec=(s.after_expiration&&s.after_expiration.recovery&&s.after_expiration.recovery.url)||s.recovery_url||'';const cc=((cust.address&&cust.address.country)||'').toUpperCase();const locale=cc==='DE'?'de':(cc==='NL'?'nl':'en');const amt=((s.amount_total!=null?s.amount_total:0))/100;const o={email:email,name:name,items:items,recovery:rec,locale:locale,amount:amt,sid:s.id||''};o.klaviyoBody=JSON.stringify({data:{type:'event',attributes:{properties:{Items:o.items,RecoveryUrl:o.recovery,'$value':o.amount},metric:{data:{type:'metric',attributes:{name:'Started Checkout'}}},profile:{data:{type:'profile',attributes:{email:o.email,first_name:o.name,properties:{Locale:o.locale}}}},value:o.amount,unique_id:'abandon-'+o.sid,time:new Date().toISOString()}}});return [{json:o}];
